name: Sandi's Favorite Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil (3-4 inches deep) to 375°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together 1 1/2 cups of flour and the remaining ingredients on low speed, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly for 30 seconds.
3. Beat on medium speed, scraping occasionally, for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in the remaining flour.
5. Place dough onto a well-floured, floured, cloth-covered board.
6. Roll gently to a thickness of 3/8 inch.
7. Cut into doughnut shapes using a floured doughnut cutter.
8. Using a wide spatula, carefully slide the doughnuts into hot oil.
9. Turn the doughnuts as they rise to the surface.
10. Fry until golden brown, about 1 to 1 1/2 minutes on each side.
11. Remove from the oil and drain on paper towels.
12. Serve plain, sugared, or frosted.
Buttermilk Doughnuts: Reduce baking powder to 2 teaspoons and beat in 1 teaspoon baking soda. Substitute buttermilk for milk. Do not use self-rising flour.
